title: Polestar shareholders: who owns the most PSNY stock?
text: Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Limited is the largest shareholder of Polestar Automotive, holding 38.21% of total shares. Eric Li reports beneficial ownership of 63,831,976 shares, representing 69.0% of the class based on 91,507,722 Class A ADSs and 996,419 Class B ADSs outstanding as of December 23, 2025. Volvo Cars, which co-founded Polestar, maintains a notable minority interest following its Nasdaq listing. Together, Geely and Volvo continue to shape Polestar's industrial strategy and technological collaboration. Polestar shares began trading on the Nasdaq exchange under the symbol PSNY on June 24, 2022, following a merger with the special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) Gores Guggenheim. On December 16, 2025, Polestar entered a USD 600 million term loan facility with Geely Sweden Automotive Investment AB. The loan is available for drawdown until March 31, 2026, and must be repaid six months after utilization unless converted into shares. Geely Sweden Automotive Investment AB may, subject to regulatory approvals, convert all or part of the loan and accrued interest into Polestar shares, further potentially increasing Geely's ownership stake.
